ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Company name of the customer */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the customer last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the customer (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support agent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the support agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the support agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the support agent */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the support agent (e.g., technical, billing) */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the agent was hired */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the agent's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the agent (e.g., active, on leave) */,
  "workload" INTEGER /* Current number of tickets assigned to the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the comment belongs to */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who made the comment */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the support agent who made the comment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the comment */,
  "is_internal" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is internal (not visible to customers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_comments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_comments_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES support_agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the history entry belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket at the time of the history entry */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was changed */,
  "status_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who changed the status */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the support agent who changed the status */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who changed the status */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ticket was resolved in this status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES support_agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "knowledge_base" (
  "kb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each knowledge base entry */,
  "question" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Text of the answer */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the question (e.g., technical, billing) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who created the entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the entry was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who last updated the entry */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the entry was last updated */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the entry has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the tag belongs to */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Text of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who interacted with the company */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., phone call, email, chat) */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the support agent involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_result" TEXT /* Result of the interaction (e.g., issue resolved, escalated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES support_agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., response time, resolution rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was calculated */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* Category of the metric (e.g., response time, resolution rate) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the support agent the metric is associated with */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the metric is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_metrics_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES support_agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_metrics_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, support agent) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  "permissions_details" TEXT /* Detailed permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
